mechanism: 用成交额与成交笔数强度代理短周期注意力与库存变化
expected_regime: works better when attention or activity pressure changes quickly
notes: 当前包含 level 与 one_day_difference 两个变体

mechanism: 用平均单笔成交额及其变化代理参与者结构与集中成交
expected_regime: works better when participation quality changes without explicit side labels
notes: 主要用于检验成交尺寸结构是否有增量

mechanism: 用每个唯一订单对应的重复事件密度代理流动性争夺程度
expected_regime: works better when liquidity contestation rises faster than simple turnover
notes: 当前依赖项目级 OrderId 形态，不宣称官方身份

mechanism: 用尾盘最后成交相对同日 VWAP 的偏离代理未消化的尾盘压力
expected_regime: works better when end-of-day price pressure carries across sessions
notes: 当前 full-year 结果最强，但方向更像反向候选

mechanism: 用订单事件与成交实现的相对强度代理未成交压力与成交摩擦
expected_regime: works better when order-side pressure changes faster than matched trade intensity or dislocation
notes: 当前已扩到 ratio/gap/interaction 三类 Gate A 原型，先做 family screening 与增量检查

mechanism: 用成交的时段结构、额度集中度和到达节奏代理盘内微观信息状态
expected_regime: works better when intraday distribution shape varies across stocks
notes: 新 family，从安全字段挖掘盘内分布形态

mechanism: 利用 vendor TradeDir 代理买卖方向失衡
expected_regime: works better when directional interest varies across stocks
